body: We have inconsistent naming of `State` and `OwnerState` `State`: `OwnerState`: *** We had agreed that this should be called `State` in the public API throughout, and the arguments/variables would be called `state` **Search keywords**:

comments.body:
**This issue has been closed.** If you have a similar problem but not exactly the same, please open a [new issue](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/new/choose).
Now, if you have additional information related to this issue or things that could help future readers, feel free to leave a comment.

labels.name: type: enhancement
labels.description: It’s an improvement, but we can’t make up our mind whether it's a bug fix or a new feature.

labels.name: scope: all components
labels.description: Widespread work has an impact on almost all components.

title: [all components] Finish renaming `OwnerState` to `State`
